text: As I walk through this modern corridor and step into the exhibition, I am enveloped by a sense of curiosity and wonder. The interplay of glass, light, and vivid design invites contemplation. In this space dedicated to innovation and R&D, I feel the pulse of human ingenuity, abstract yet tangible. I am eager to absorb the ideas on display but also somewhat small in the presence of such organized knowledge and potential. Here, time seems simultaneously paused and propelled forward by invention.
